questions.question: Explain the role of Transport Layer Security (TLS) in securing IoT device communication. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Describe the process of how TLS ensures data confidentiality and integrity in IoT communication

questions.question: Compare and contrast CoAP and MQTT in IoT device communication. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Discuss the trade-offs between these two protocols, including their strengths and weaknesses

questions.question: Describe the process of establishing a connection using DTLS in IoT devices. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Explain the steps involved in establishing a DTLS connection, including key exchange and authentication
